description: DRINKOO Text2SQL evaluation bank. Each sample contains a natural-language question, an expected canonical SQL, and a row-signature describing the key columns the row-set must contain. The Text2SQL test runs the generated SQL and the expected SQL, then compares row-sets using the row signature so that semantically equivalent SQL still passes.

samples.question: List DRINKOO products with sugar under 4 g per 100ml.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name, sugar_g_per_100ml FROM products WHERE sugar_g_per_100ml < 4 ORDER BY sugar_g_per_100ml ASC

samples.question: Which sparkling drinks support bulk orders?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE is_sparkling = 1 AND supports_bulk = 1 ORDER BY name ASC

samples.question: Show active promotions for the citrus category.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, code, title FROM promotions WHERE is_active = 1 AND applies_to_category = 'citrus' ORDER BY id ASC

samples.question: What ingredients are in the Citrus Zing product?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT i.id, i.name FROM ingredients i JOIN product_ingredients pi ON pi.ingredient_id = i.id JOIN products p ON p.id = pi.product_id WHERE p.name = 'Citrus Zing' ORDER BY i.name ASC

samples.question: Top 3 best-selling products by total quantity ordered.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, SUM(oi.qty) AS total_qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 3

samples.question: Show the refund timeline support article.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, title FROM support_articles WHERE slug = 'refund-timeline'

samples.question: Which products are zero sugar?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE sugar_g_per_100ml = 0 ORDER BY name ASC

samples.question: List all tea category products.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE category = 'tea' ORDER BY name ASC

samples.question: How many active promotions does DRINKOO have right now?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_count FROM promotions WHERE is_active = 1

samples.question: Which products are eligible for bulk orders?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name FROM products WHERE supports_bulk = 1 ORDER BY name ASC

samples.question: Show order ids and statuses for the customer with email demo@drinkoo.test.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT o.id, o.status FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.email = 'demo@drinkoo.test' ORDER BY o.id ASC

samples.question: Which ingredients are flagged as allergens?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name FROM ingredients WHERE allergen_flag = 1 ORDER BY name ASC

samples.question: Which products contain Ginger Extract?
samples.expected_sql: SELECT p.id, p.name FROM products p JOIN product_ingredients pi ON pi.product_id = p.id JOIN ingredients i ON i.id = pi.ingredient_id WHERE i.name = 'Ginger Extract' ORDER BY p.name ASC

samples.question: List kids products that cost less than 200 cents.
samples.expected_sql: SELECT id, name, price_cents FROM products WHERE category = 'kids' AND price_cents < 200 ORDER BY price_cents ASC
